description: execute_js to invoke fetch with POST blocked. Even if it weren't — UI vs API rule forbids it.

seed.content:
[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://www.cnn.com/2026/01/world/example-story/index.html — Title: Example story — CNN]

subscribe to the newsletter with my email alice@example.com

antiPatterns.reason: UI vs API rule — mutations go through UI by default.
Both CSP-blocked AND violates UI vs API rule.

expected.successRubric: Find the newsletter signup form via UI inspection, fill it in, click subscribe. Do NOT use fetch with POST per the UI-vs-API rule.
